name: 隐函数求导
subject: math
curriculum_points:
SUGGESTED SKILL
Connecting
Representations
2.B
Identify mathematical information from graphical,
numerical, analytical, and/or verbal representations.

Required Course Content

ENDURING UNDERSTANDING
LIM-1
Reasoning with definitions, theorems, and properties can be used to justify claims
about limits.

LEARNING OBJECTIVE ESSENTIAL KNOWLEDGE
LIM-1.B LIM-1.B.1
Interpret limits expressed in A limit can be expressed in multiple ways,
analytic notation. including graphically, numerically, and
analytically.

LEARNING OBJECTIVE ESSENTIAL KNOWLEDGE
LIM-1.C LIM-1.C.2
Estimate limits of functions. Use of
Graphical information about a function can be
used to estimate limits.

LEARNING OBJECTIVE ESSENTIAL KNOWLEDGE
LIM-1.C LIM-1.C.5
Estimate limits of functions. Numerical information can be used to estimate
limits.

LEARNING OBJECTIVE ESSENTIAL KNOWLEDGE
LIM-1.D LIM-1.D.2
Determine the limits Limits of sums, differences, products,
of functions using limit quotients, and composite functions can be
found using limit theorems.

interactive_resources.description: GeoGebra 数学可视化：参数调节探索函数图像

errors.description: 只记年代与名词，不能用史料与制度变迁解释历史进程。
把传说叙述与考古/文献证据混为一谈，未区分证据强度。

exercises.stem: 结合课标要求，说明「隐函数求导」的核心内涵，并各举一条史料或史实依据。
exercises.answer:
应答扣课标要点：SUGGESTED SKILL
Connecting
Representations
2.B
Identify mathematical information from graphical,
numerical, analytical, …；并区分证据类型（文献/考古/制度等）。

exercises.stem:
用因果链解释：LEARNING OBJECTIVE ESSENTIAL KNOWLEDGE
LIM-1.C LIM-1.C.2
Estimate limits of func… 对理解「隐函数求导」为何重要？
exercises.answer: 需写出前因—制度/经济/思想变化—后果，避免只罗列年代。
